hooks.command:
# HOOK_VERSION: 2.0.0
jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.md) if [ -f "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/obsidian-iconize/icon-map.json" ]; then python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/iconize_sync.py" sync "$f" >/dev/null || true; fi ;; esac; }

# HOOK_VERSION: 2.0.0
if [ -f "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/obsidian-iconize/icon-map.json" ]; then python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/iconize_sync.py" reconcile-dirty >/dev/null || true; fi
